option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# Mobile Final Project
## Map-based order tracking
This project now includes a map-first delivery finder experience in `DriverFinderFragment`.
### Implemented features - Order pickup/drop-off points rendered on an interactive map - Device geolocation with runtime permission handling - A distinct current-location indicator - Marker selection opens a delivery detail bottom sheet - Lightweight clustering behavior for dense map areas - Customer dashboard with order counters and quick actions - Customer My Orders list with status filtering - Customer New Order flow with address/date/time/description/budget validation - Places autocomplete support with manual-address fallback when no Maps API key is set - Unit + instrumentation test coverage for map behavior and customer data flow
## Verified commands
```bash cd /home/razbro/Repos/mobile-final-project ./gradlew :app:assembleDebug --no-daemon ./gradlew :app:testDebugUnitTest --no-daemon ./gradlew :app:assembleAndroidTest --no-daemon ```
## Notes - Instrumentation tests compile successfully in this environment. - Running them on-device requires Android platform tooling and a connected emulator/device.
### Optional on-device instrumentation run
```bash cd /home/razbro/Repos/mobile-final-project ./gradlew :app:connectedDebugAndroidTest --no-daemon ```

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <manifest xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools">
<<<<<<< HEAD <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.ACCESS_NETWORK_STATE" /> <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION" /> <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.ACCESS_COARSE_LOCATION" /> ======= <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION" /> <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.ACCESS_COARSE_LOCATION" /> <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE" /> <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.READ_MEDIA_IMAGES" /> >>>>>>> 9ee08d12457e62b43cd641766869fea927e29541
<application android:allowBackup="true" android:dataExtractionRules="@xml/data_extraction_rules" android:fullBackupContent="@xml/backup_rules" android:icon="@mipmap/ic_launcher" android:label="@string/app_name" android:roundIcon="@mipmap/ic_launcher_round" android:supportsRtl="true" android:theme="@style/Theme.MobileFinalProject">
<!-- Google Places API Key --> <meta-data android:name="com.google.android.geo.API_KEY" android:value="${MAPS_API_KEY}" />
<activity android:name=".MainActivity" android:exported="true"> <intent-filter> <action android:name="android.intent.action.MAIN" />
<category android:name="android.intent.category.LAUNCHER" /> </intent-filter> </activity> </application>
</manifest>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <manifest xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools">
<uses-permission android:name="android.permission.INTERNET" /> <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.ACCESS_NETWORK_STATE" /> <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION" /> <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.ACCESS_COARSE_LOCATION" /> <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.POST_NOTIFICATIONS" /> <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE" /> <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.READ_MEDIA_IMAGES" />
<application android:allowBackup="true" android:dataExtractionRules="@xml/data_extraction_rules" android:fullBackupContent="@xml/backup_rules" android:icon="@mipmap/ic_launcher" android:label="@string/app_name" android:roundIcon="@mipmap/ic_launcher_round" android:supportsRtl="true" android:theme="@style/Theme.MobileFinalProject">
<!-- Google Places API Key --> <meta-data android:name="com.google.android.geo.API_KEY" android:value="${MAPS_API_KEY}" />
<activity android:name=".MainActivity" android:exported="true"> <intent-filter> <action android:name="android.intent.action.MAIN" />
<category android:name="android.intent.category.LAUNCHER" /> </intent-filter> </activity> </application>
</manifest>

option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <shape xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:shape="oval"> <solid android:color="#2E7D32" /> </shape>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <shape xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:shape="oval"> <solid android:color="#C62828" /> </shape>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <shape xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:shape="rectangle"> <solid android:color="#FF9800" /> <corners android:radius="20dp" /> </shape>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <shape xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:shape="rectangle"> <corners android:radius="24dp" /> <gradient android:angle="0" android:startColor="@color/teal_700" android:centerColor="@color/blue_500" android:endColor="@color/blue_700" /> </shape>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <ScrollView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@color/white" android:fillViewport="true">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp">
<!-- Header Section --> <com.google.android.material.textview.MaterialTextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Edit Order" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textSize="20sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<com.google.android.material.textview.MaterialTextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:text="Update your delivery details" android:textColor="@color/gray_700" android:textSize="12sp" />
<!-- Delivery Details Card --> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="24dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/white" app:cardCornerRadius="12dp" app:cardElevation="2dp" app:strokeColor="@color/teal_200" app:strokeWidth="1dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp">
<!-- Delivery Details Header --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="horizontal">
<com.google.android.material.textview.MaterialTextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content"
android:text="Delivery Details" android:textColor="@color/teal_700" android:textSize="16sp" android:textStyle="bold" /> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Pickup Address --> <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:id="@+id/customer_edit_order_pickup_address_layout" style="@style/Widget.Material3.TextInputLayout.OutlinedBox" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" app:boxCornerRadiusBottomEnd="8dp" app:boxCornerRadiusBottomStart="8dp" app:boxCornerRadiusTopEnd="8dp" app:boxCornerRadiusTopStart="8dp" app:boxStrokeColor="@color/teal_700" app:startIconDrawable="@drawable/ic_location" app:startIconTint="@color/teal_700">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/customer_edit_order_pickup_address_edit_text" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="false" android:hint="Pickup address... *" android:inputType="none" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textColorHint="@color/gray_700" android:textSize="14sp" /> </com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<!-- Delivery Address --> <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:id="@+id/customer_edit_order_destination_address_layout" style="@style/Widget.Material3.TextInputLayout.OutlinedBox" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" app:boxCornerRadiusBottomEnd="8dp" app:boxCornerRadiusBottomStart="8dp" app:boxCornerRadiusTopEnd="8dp" app:boxCornerRadiusTopStart="8dp" app:boxStrokeColor="@color/teal_700" app:startIconDrawable="@drawable/ic_location" app:startIconTint="@color/blue_500">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/customer_edit_order_destination_address_edit_text" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="false" android:hint="Destination address... *" android:inputType="none" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textColorHint="@color/gray_700" android:textSize="14sp" /> </com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:orientation="horizontal">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp" android:orientation="vertical">
<com.google.android.material.textview.MaterialTextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Delivery Date" android:textColor="@color/teal_700" android:textSize="14sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:id="@+id/customer_edit_order_pickup_date_layout" style="@style/Widget.Material3.TextInputLayout.OutlinedBox" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" app:boxCornerRadiusBottomEnd="8dp" app:boxCornerRadiusBottomStart="8dp" app:boxCornerRadiusTopEnd="8dp" app:boxCornerRadiusTopStart="8dp" app:boxStrokeColor="@color/teal_700">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/customer_edit_order_pickup_date_edit_text" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:focusable="false" android:hint="DD/MM/YYYY *" android:inputType="none" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textColorHint="@color/gray_700" android:textSize="14sp" /> </com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout> </LinearLayout>
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:orientation="vertical">
<com.google.android.material.textview.MaterialTextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Pickup Time" android:textColor="@color/teal_700" android:textSize="14sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:id="@+id/customer_edit_order_pickup_time_layout" style="@style/Widget.Material3.TextInputLayout.OutlinedBox" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" app:boxCornerRadiusBottomEnd="8dp" app:boxCornerRadiusBottomStart="8dp" app:boxCornerRadiusTopEnd="8dp" app:boxCornerRadiusTopStart="8dp" app:boxStrokeColor="@color/teal_700">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/customer_edit_order_pickup_time_edit_text" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="false" android:hint="HH:MM *" android:inputType="none" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textColorHint="@color/gray_700" android:textSize="14sp" /> </com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout> </LinearLayout> </LinearLayout> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<!-- Package Details Card --> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="24dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/white" app:cardCornerRadius="12dp" app:cardElevation="2dp" app:strokeColor="@color/teal_200" app:strokeWidth="1dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp">
<!-- Package Details Header --> <com.google.android.material.textview.MaterialTextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Package Details" android:textColor="@color/teal_700" android:textSize="16sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<!-- Order Description --> <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:id="@+id/customer_edit_order_description_layout" style="@style/Widget.Material3.TextInputLayout.OutlinedBox" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" app:boxCornerRadiusBottomEnd="8dp" app:boxCornerRadiusBottomStart="8dp" app:boxCornerRadiusTopEnd="8dp" app:boxCornerRadiusTopStart="8dp" app:boxStrokeColor="@color/teal_700">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/customer_edit_order_description_edit_text" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:hint="Describe your package... *" android:inputType="textMultiLine" android:lines="2" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textColorHint="@color/gray_700" android:textSize="14sp" /> </com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<!-- Add Image Button --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/customer_edit_order_add_image_button" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:text="Update Image" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="@color/teal_700" app:cornerRadius="8dp" app:iconTint="@color/teal_700" app:strokeColor="@color/teal_700" app:strokeWidth="1dp" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton" />
<!-- Image Preview --> <ImageView android:id="@+id/customer_edit_order_image_preview" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="200dp" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:scaleType="centerInside" android:contentDescription="Package image preview" android:visibility="gone" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<!-- Budget Card --> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="24dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/white" app:cardCornerRadius="12dp" app:cardElevation="2dp" app:strokeColor="@color/teal_200" app:strokeWidth="1dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp">
<!-- Budget Header --> <com.google.android.material.textview.MaterialTextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Budget" android:textColor="@color/teal_700" android:textSize="16sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<!-- Budget Amount --> <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:id="@+id/customer_edit_order_budget_layout" style="@style/Widget.Material3.TextInputLayout.OutlinedBox" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" app:boxCornerRadiusBottomEnd="8dp" app:boxCornerRadiusBottomStart="8dp" app:boxCornerRadiusTopEnd="8dp" app:boxCornerRadiusTopStart="8dp" app:boxStrokeColor="@color/teal_700" app:prefixText="$">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/customer_edit_order_budget_edit_text" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:hint="Enter budget amount *" android:inputType="numberDecimal" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textColorHint="@color/gray_700" android:textSize="14sp" /> </com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<!-- Buttons Section --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="24dp" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center">
<!-- Cancel Button --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/customer_edit_order_cancel_button" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp" android:text="Cancel" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="@color/teal_700" app:cornerRadius="8dp" app:strokeColor="@color/teal_700" app:strokeWidth="1dp" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton" />
<!-- Submit Button --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/customer_edit_order_submit_button" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_marginStart="8dp" android:text="Update Order" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="@color/white" app:backgroundTint="@color/teal_700" app:cornerRadius="8dp" /> </LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout> </ScrollView>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <FrameLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@color/white">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="center" android:text="Home" android:textSize="24sp" />
</FrameLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <ScrollView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="#FFF8FAFC" android:fillViewport="true">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp">
<FrameLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="@drawable/customer_home_hero_background" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="20dp">
<TextView android:id="@+id/customer_home_title_text_view" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/customer_home_title" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="24sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/customer_home_subtitle_text_view" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="6dp" android:text="@string/customer_home_subtitle" android:textColor="#E6FFFFFF" android:textSize="14sp" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="14dp" android:text="Track, request, and manage your deliveries from one place." android:textColor="#D9FFFFFF" android:textSize="13sp" /> </LinearLayout>
</FrameLayout>
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="18dp" android:orientation="horizontal">
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp" android:layout_weight="1" app:cardBackgroundColor="#E0F2F1" app:cardCornerRadius="18dp" app:cardElevation="0dp" app:strokeColor="@color/teal_200" app:strokeWidth="1dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="14dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/customer_home_pending" android:textColor="@color/gray_700" android:textSize="12sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/customer_home_pending_count_text_view" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="6dp" android:text="0" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textSize="28sp" android:textStyle="bold" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="8dp" android:layout_weight="1" app:cardBackgroundColor="#E3F2FD" app:cardCornerRadius="18dp" app:cardElevation="0dp" app:strokeColor="@color/blue_500" app:strokeWidth="1dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="14dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/customer_home_active" android:textColor="@color/gray_700" android:textSize="12sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/customer_home_active_count_text_view" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="6dp" android:text="0" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textSize="28sp" android:textStyle="bold" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView> </LinearLayout>
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="20dp" android:text="Quick Actions" android:textColor="@color/gray_700" android:textSize="13sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/customer_home_new_order_button" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="56dp" android:layout_marginTop="10dp" android:text="@string/customer_home_create_order" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="@color/white" app:backgroundTint="@color/teal_700" app:cornerRadius="18dp" app:icon="@android:drawable/ic_input_add" app:iconGravity="textStart" app:iconPadding="10dp" app:iconTint="@color/white" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/customer_home_my_orders_button" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="56dp" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:text="@string/customer_home_view_orders" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="@color/blue_700" app:cornerRadius="18dp" app:icon="@android:drawable/ic_menu_agenda" app:iconGravity="textStart" app:iconPadding="10dp" app:iconTint="@color/blue_700" app:strokeColor="@color/blue_500" app:strokeWidth="1dp" />
</LinearLayout> </ScrollView>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="@android:color/white" android:orientation="vertical" android:paddingBottom="24dp">
<!-- Drag handle --> <View android:layout_width="40dp" android:layout_height="4dp" android:layout_gravity="center_horizontal" android:layout_marginTop="10dp" android:background="#DDDDDD" />
<!-- Header row: title + close --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:paddingHorizontal="20dp" android:paddingTop="12dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:orientation="vertical">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tv_order_id" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Order #—" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tv_status_badge" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:paddingHorizontal="10dp" android:paddingVertical="3dp" android:text="Pending" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:textSize="12sp" android:background="@drawable/bg_status_badge" /> </LinearLayout>
<ImageButton android:id="@+id/btn_close_sheet" android:layout_width="36dp" android:layout_height="36dp" android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackgroundBorderless" android:contentDescription="Close" android:src="@android:drawable/ic_menu_close_clear_cancel" app:tint="@color/black" /> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Divider --> <View android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="1dp" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:background="#EEEEEE" />
<!-- Customer info --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:paddingHorizontal="20dp" android:paddingTop="14dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="Customer" android:textColor="#888888" android:textSize="12sp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tv_customer_name" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="—" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textSize="14sp" android:textStyle="bold" /> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Phone --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:paddingHorizontal="20dp" android:paddingTop="8dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="Phone" android:textColor="#888888" android:textSize="12sp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tv_phone" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="—" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textSize="14sp" /> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Price --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:paddingHorizontal="20dp" android:paddingTop="8dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="Price" android:textColor="#888888" android:textSize="12sp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tv_price" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="—" android:textColor="#2E7D32" android:textSize="14sp" android:textStyle="bold" /> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Pickup address --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:paddingHorizontal="20dp" android:paddingTop="12dp">
<!-- Green dot --> <TextView android:layout_width="16dp" android:layout_height="16dp" android:layout_marginTop="2dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_dot_green" android:layout_marginEnd="10dp" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="PICKUP" android:textColor="#888888" android:textSize="10sp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tv_pickup_address" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="—" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textSize="13sp" /> </LinearLayout> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Drop-off address --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:paddingHorizontal="20dp" android:paddingTop="10dp">
<!-- Red dot --> <TextView android:layout_width="16dp" android:layout_height="16dp" android:layout_marginTop="2dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_dot_red" android:layout_marginEnd="10dp" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="DROP-OFF" android:textColor="#888888" android:textSize="10sp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tv_dropoff_address" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="—" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textSize="13sp" /> </LinearLayout> </LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@color/white" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="vertical">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="@color/white" android:orientation="horizontal" android:padding="16dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_weight="1" android:background="@color/white" android:orientation="vertical">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Delivery Finder" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textSize="20sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:text="Find new delivery jobs" android:textColor="@color/gray_700" android:textSize="12sp" /> </LinearLayout>
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@color/white" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="vertical">
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/finder_deliveries_open_map_button" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Open Map" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textSize="12sp" app:cornerRadius="8dp" app:icon="@android:drawable/ic_dialog_map" app:iconTint="@color/black" app:strokeColor="@color/black" app:strokeWidth="1dp"/> </LinearLayout>
<<<<<<< HEAD <!-- Location permission denied banner (shown at bottom) --> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/location_denied_banner" ======= </LinearLayout>
<!-- Deliveries List RecyclerView --> <androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/driver_finder_deliveries_recycler_view" >>>>>>> 9ee08d12457e62b43cd641766869fea927e29541 </LinearLayout>
<!-- Deliveries List RecyclerView --> <androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/finder_deliveries_recycler_view" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:paddingHorizontal="16dp" />
</LinearLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.coordinatorlayout.widget.CoordinatorLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent">
<!-- Full-screen map --> <org.osmdroid.views.MapView android:id="@+id/map_view" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:clickable="true" />
<!-- Header card overlaid at the top --> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_margin="12dp" app:cardCornerRadius="12dp" app:cardElevation="6dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:padding="12dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:orientation="vertical">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/delivery_finder_title" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="2dp" android:text="@string/delivery_finder_subtitle" android:textColor="@color/gray_700" android:textSize="12sp" /> </LinearLayout>
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btn_my_location" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/my_location" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textSize="12sp" app:cornerRadius="8dp" app:icon="@android:drawable/ic_menu_mylocation" app:iconTint="@color/black" app:strokeColor="@color/black" app:strokeWidth="1dp" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<!-- Location permission denied banner (shown at bottom) --> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/location_denied_banner" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="bottom" android:layout_margin="12dp" android:visibility="gone" app:cardBackgroundColor="#FFF3CD" app:cardCornerRadius="12dp" app:cardElevation="4dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:padding="12dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="@string/location_permission_denied_banner" android:textColor="#856404" android:textSize="13sp" />
<ImageButton android:id="@+id/btn_dismiss_banner" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackgroundBorderless" android:contentDescription="@string/dismiss" android:src="@android:drawable/ic_menu_close_clear_cancel" app:tint="#856404" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
</androidx.coordinatorlayout.widget.CoordinatorLayout>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <navigation xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:id="@+id/customer_nav_graph" app:startDestination="@id/customerHomeFragment">
<fragment android:id="@+id/customerHomeFragment" android:name="com.example.mobilefinalproject.ui.customer.CustomerHomeFragment" android:label="Home" tools:layout="@layout/fragment_customer_home" />
<fragment android:id="@+id/customerNewOrderFragment" android:name="com.example.mobilefinalproject.ui.customer.CustomerNewOrderFragment" android:label="New Order" tools:layout="@layout/fragment_customer_new_order"> <action android:id="@+id/action_customerNewOrderFragment_to_customerHomeFragment" app:destination="@id/customerHomeFragment" app:popUpTo="@id/customerHomeFragment" app:popUpToInclusive="false" /> </fragment>
<fragment android:id="@+id/customerMyOrdersFragment" android:name="com.example.mobilefinalproject.ui.customer.CustomerMyOrdersFragment" android:label="My Orders" tools:layout="@layout/fragment_customer_my_orders" />
<fragment android:id="@+id/customerProfileFragment" android:name="com.example.mobilefinalproject.ui.customer.CustomerProfileFragment" android:label="Profile" tools:layout="@layout/fragment_customer_profile"> <action android:id="@+id/action_customerProfileFragment_to_customerEditProfileFragment" app:destination="@id/customerEditProfileFragment" /> </fragment>
<fragment android:id="@+id/customerEditProfileFragment" android:name="com.example.mobilefinalproject.ui.customer.CustomerEditProfileFragment" android:label="Edit Profile" tools:layout="@layout/fragment_customer_edit_profile" />
<fragment android:id="@+id/customerEditOrderFragment" android:name="com.example.mobilefinalproject.ui.customer.CustomerEditOrderFragment" android:label="Edit Order" tools:layout="@layout/fragment_customer_edit_order"> <action android:id="@+id/action_customerEditOrderFragment_to_customerMyOrdersFragment" app:destination="@id/customerMyOrdersFragment" app:popUpTo="@id/customerMyOrdersFragment" app:popUpToInclusive="false" /> </fragment>
</navigation>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <navigation xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:id="@+id/customer_nav_graph" app:startDestination="@id/customerHomeFragment">
<fragment android:id="@+id/customerHomeFragment" android:name="com.example.mobilefinalproject.ui.customer.CustomerHomeFragment" android:label="Home" tools:layout="@layout/fragment_customer_home"> <action android:id="@+id/action_customerHomeFragment_to_customerNewOrderFragment" app:destination="@id/customerNewOrderFragment" app:popUpTo="@id/customerHomeFragment" app:popUpToInclusive="false" /> <action android:id="@+id/action_customerHomeFragment_to_customerMyOrdersFragment" app:destination="@id/customerMyOrdersFragment" app:popUpTo="@id/customerHomeFragment" app:popUpToInclusive="false" /> </fragment>
<fragment android:id="@+id/customerNewOrderFragment" android:name="com.example.mobilefinalproject.ui.customer.CustomerNewOrderFragment" android:label="New Order" tools:layout="@layout/fragment_customer_new_order"> <action android:id="@+id/action_customerNewOrderFragment_to_customerHomeFragment" app:destination="@id/customerHomeFragment" app:popUpTo="@id/customerHomeFragment" app:popUpToInclusive="false" /> </fragment>
<fragment android:id="@+id/customerMyOrdersFragment" android:name="com.example.mobilefinalproject.ui.customer.CustomerMyOrdersFragment" android:label="My Orders" tools:layout="@layout/fragment_customer_my_orders"> <action android:id="@+id/action_customerMyOrdersFragment_to_customerEditOrderFragment" app:destination="@id/customerEditOrderFragment" /> </fragment>
<fragment android:id="@+id/customerProfileFragment" android:name="com.example.mobilefinalproject.ui.customer.CustomerProfileFragment" android:label="Profile" tools:layout="@layout/fragment_customer_profile"> <action android:id="@+id/action_customerProfileFragment_to_customerEditProfileFragment" app:destination="@id/customerEditProfileFragment" /> </fragment>
<fragment android:id="@+id/customerEditProfileFragment" android:name="com.example.mobilefinalproject.ui.customer.CustomerEditProfileFragment" android:label="Edit Profile" tools:layout="@layout/fragment_customer_edit_profile" />
<fragment android:id="@+id/customerEditOrderFragment" android:name="com.example.mobilefinalproject.ui.customer.CustomerEditOrderFragment" android:label="Edit Order" tools:layout="@layout/fragment_customer_edit_order"> <argument android:name="delivery" app:argType="com.example.mobilefinalproject.models.Delivery" /> <action android:id="@+id/action_customerEditOrderFragment_to_customerMyOrdersFragment" app:destination="@id/customerMyOrdersFragment" app:popUpTo="@id/customerMyOrdersFragment" app:popUpToInclusive="false" /> </fragment>
</navigation>

option.name: originalContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <resources> <string name="app_name">TruckBack</string> <string name="app_title">TruckBack</string> </resources>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <resources> <string name="app_name">TruckBack</string> <string name="app_title">TruckBack</string> <string name="delivery_finder_title">Delivery Finder</string> <string name="delivery_finder_subtitle">Tap a marker to view delivery details</string> <string name="my_location">My Location</string> <string name="location_permission_denied_banner">Location access denied. Enable it in Settings to see your position on the map.</string> <string name="dismiss">Dismiss</string> <string name="order_id_format">Order #%1$s</string> <string name="locations_nearby">%1$d locations nearby</string> <string name="zoom_in_for_orders">Zoom in to view individual orders</string> </resources>

option.name: updatedContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
